2604.23841.title: Scalable Production Scheduling: Linear Complexity via Unified Homogeneous Graphs
2604.23841.paper_summary: Efficiently solving the Job Shop Scheduling Problem in real-world industrial applications requires policies that are both computationally lean and topologically robust. While Reinforcement Learning has shown potential in automating dispatching rules, existing models often struggle with a scalability bottleneck caused by quadratic graph complexity or the architectural overhead of heterogeneous layers. We introduce a unified graph framework that employs feature-based homogenization to project distinct node roles into a shared latent space. This allows a standard homogeneous Graph Isomorphism Network to capture complex resource contention with linear complexity, ensuring low-latency inference for large-scale industrial applications. Our empirical results demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance while exhibiting consistent zero-shot generalization. We identify the job-to-machine ratio as the primary driver of policy effectiveness, rather than absolute problem size. Based on this, we propose a hypothesis of structural saturation, demonstrating that policies trained on critically congested instances ($\mathcal{J} \approx \mathcal{M}$) learn scale-invariant resolution strategies. Agents trained at this saturation point internalize invariant conflict-resolution logic, allowing them to treat massive rectangular instances as a sequential concatenation of saturated sub-problems. This approach eliminates the need for expensive scale-specific retraining and prevents overfitting to statistical shortcuts, providing a robust and efficient pathway for deploying RL solutions in dynamic production environments.
2604.23841.paper_summary_zh: 有效解決實際工業應用中的工作車間排程問題需要既計算高效又拓撲穩健的政策。雖然強化學習在自動化調度規則方面顯示出潛力，但現有模型往往面臨由於二次圖形複雜性或異構層的架構開銷造成的可擴展性瓶頸。我們提出了一個統一的圖形框架，利用基於特徵的同質化將不同的節點角色投影到共享的潛在空間。這使得標準的同質圖同構網絡能以線性複雜度捕捉複雜的資源競爭，確保在大規模工業應用中進行低延遲推斷。我們的實證結果表明，我們的框架實現了最先進的性能，同時展現出一致的零樣本泛化。我們確定工作與機器的比例是政策有效性的主要驅動因素，而不是絕對問題大小。基於此，我們提出了一個結構飽和的假設，證明在臨界擁擠實例上訓練的政策（$\mathcal{J} \approx \mathcal{M}$）學會了尺度不變的解決策略。在這個飽和點訓練的代理內化了不變的衝突解決邏輯，使他們能將大規模矩形實例視為飽和子問題的序列串聯。這種方法消除了對昂貴的特定規模再訓練的需求，並防止了對統計捷徑的過擬合，為在動態生產環境中部署強化學習解決方案提供了一條穩健而高效的途徑。
2604.23841.author: Jonathan Hoss et.al.
2604.23841.authors: Jonathan Hoss, Moritz Link, Noah Klarmann
